name: 下海多少天的日期后边素材

There are still cathes in the fish box.
empty it before heading out to sea!

No available dives.
Daily login gives 5 dives!

Rainbow fish are said to appear in the 
deep sea, bringing luck to those who find
them, but they move swiftly!

Really? I can use my X-DPV to catch 
them!

You can also try using the super booster.
Rumor has it they can be found inside
treasure chests in the deep sea, but for 
new comers, it’s best to begin by 
exploring the shadowed regions.

The current fish box is overweight 
and cannot accommodate any more fish.

and all your catches have escaped.

forget to watch your 
dive time!

You can't catch more 
fish when your box is 
full.

Swipe to move forward, 
and guide fishes into the 
center of the white light.

Tap quikly to retrieve
the harpoon.
